title: Racosperma obesum
taxonomy: Racosperma obesum is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the 'Stick Tree'. It is native to Australia and has been introduced to other parts of the world as an ornamental plant. The plant is classified as Racosperma obesum, which is a synonym for Acacia obesa. It is a small tree or shrub that grows up to 3 meters tall and has a distinctive, rounded habit. The classification of Racosperma obesum reflects its position within the Acacia genus.
